title: Culver’s Opening in Auburndale
summary: Construction is underway on US 92 West for Auburndale’s newest Culver’s location.

title: 500-Home Community Approved in Davenport
summary: A new residential community will feature single-family homes, amenities, and green spaces.

title: US 27 Interchange Project Moving Forward
summary: Major interchange improvements will enhance safety, reduce congestion, and support growth.

title: Holiday Inn Express Coming to Winter Haven
summary: A new 100-room hotel is planned near the Legoland area, with construction expected soon.
